  "content": "# XNP-0003: Federation\n\nStatus: Draft\n\n## Summary\n\nDefines how independently authored substrates can be analyzed together.\n\n## Motivation\n\nXanaNode aims to support independently authored knowledge substrates that can later interoperate. This proposal records the design expectations for federation so implementations can converge without requiring centralized control.\n\n## Requirements\n\n- Must remain human-readable.\n- Must remain machine-interpretable.\n- Must preserve provenance.\n- Must avoid destructive merging.\n- Must allow independent substrate ownership.\n\n## Open Questions\n\n- What is the smallest useful implementation?\n- Which parts are required for compatibility?\n- Which parts should remain optional or experimental?\n",
